strategy: Team fight (~45,000 health, Wallaru finale): hitter, supports, and a healer/utility to manage Krok Ankhs.
Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+30% each); never Balance (67% resist).

He drops a random Krok Ankh on Round 1, every 3rd Round, and on late joins, some on himself (Charm or Ward), some on a random Wizard (Curse, Jinx, or DoT). These only come off with spells that specifically remove that effect (Cleanse Charm, Steal or remove Ward, Triage), not by damage.
Before the kill shot, strip every Krok Ankh. If he dies with any Ankh up, he heals to 100%, and the heal is percentage-based, so Infection cannot stop it.
Time your burst just after a clearing round and before the next 3rd-Round Ankh, with all blades and Feints funneled to the hitter.
cheatNotes: On Round 1, every 3rd Round, and on late joins he casts a random Krok Ankh hanging effect.
Krok Ankhs on himself are a Charm or a Ward.
Krok Ankhs on a random Wizard are a Curse, Jinx, or Damage-over-Time.
Ankhs only come off with the matching removal spell (Cleanse Charm, Ward removal, Triage). Damage will not clear them.
If he dies while any Krok Ankh is still up, he restores to 100% health. Clear all Ankhs before the kill.
The revive heal is percentage-based, so Infection cannot weaken it.
